Reader Love

Praise

★★★★★

"This was a heartfelt sapphic romance that completely won me over. "Finding Her Home" delivers a slow-burn connection that's both tender and passionate. The first-time/sexuality awakening arc is handled with care, and the chemistry? Off the charts. Perfect for fans of queer romance with big feels, low angst, and high heat. I can't wait to read the next in the series... Highly Recommended!"

— Verified Amazon Reviewer (Finding Her Home)

★★★★★

"Annie Wiest and her Sacred Peaks-series has become my new go-to for low angst, soulful sapphic novellas."

— Verified Goodreads Reviewer (Stirring Her Soul)

★★★★★

"Annie Wiest has shared a very special place, story and love in this book. I was mesmerized right off the bat."

— Verified Amazon Reviewer (Stirring Her Soul)

★★★★★

"I picked this up because I love small-town ranch settings, and it delivered exactly the cozy, heartfelt vibe I was hoping for. The romance felt natural and tender, and I appreciated how the story balanced emotional depth with lighter, sweet moments. The ranch backdrop made everything feel grounded and real, I could practically picture the wide-open spaces. What stood out most was how relatable the characters' struggles were. It wasn't just about falling in love, but also about belonging and finding a place to call home. By the end, I was rooting hard for them and left with a big smile."

— Verified Amazon Reviewer (Finding Her Home)

★★★★★

"This story completely stole my heart. The chemistry between the two leads feel so natural and deeply emotional, and the Colorado ranch setting adds the perfect cozy, romantic backdrop. I loved mix of tenderness, heat, and genuine self-discovery, it felt real without unnecessary drama. It's the kind of sapphic romance that leaves you smiling long after you finish."

— Verified Amazon Reviewer (Finding Her Home)

★★★★★

"I am officially obsessed with Emily and Alex! There is something so satisfying about the "Grumpy x Sunshine" dynamic."

— Verified Amazon Reviewer (Healing Her Heart)

★★★★★

"A lovely story with both fascinating characters & in depth historical values."

— Verified Goodreads Reviewer (Lighting Her Fire)

★★★★★

"Two competent women, an avalanche and native history. The Sacred Peaks series features strong, competent women who fall in love."

— Verified Goodreads Reviewer (Lighting Her Fire)

★★★★★

"The Sacred land calls to the artists. This series of sapphic romances set on a ranch in Colorado has become one of my favorite reads."

— Goodreads Reviewer (Drawing Her Close)

★★★★★

"I loved the start being all about the scenery and the work done around the ranch."

— Goodreads Reviewer (Drawing Her Close)
